title: asplenium esculentum
intro: Asplenium esculentum, also known as the asparagus fern or asparagus tree, is a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. Traditionally, the rhizome of this plant has been used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Asplenium esculentum are said to include treating urinary tract issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the rhizome is often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions.
